MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_adt_rtcr.LongName: ADT Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_adt_rter.LongName: ADT Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_adt_female_rtcr.LongName: ADT Median Response Time for Correct Female Trial Responses

cnb_adt_male_rtcr.LongName: ADT Median Response Time for Correct Male Trial Responses

cnb_adt_cnt_200.LongName: ADT Total Count of Responses Under 250 milliseconds

cnb_adt_lrsr.LongName: ADT Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_adt_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Age Differentiation Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
